scrapers.name: The Tractor Tavern
scrapers.note: TicketWeb 'flexmedia' widget, server-rendered. Selectors verified against the live page 2026-07.

scrapers.name: Skylark Cafe
scrapers.note: Webflow collection, server-rendered. Selectors verified against the live page 2026-07.

scrapers.name: The Valley
scrapers.note: Squarespace event list, server-rendered (the old /shows path 404s). Verified 2026-07.

scrapers.name: The Showbox
scrapers.note: AEG events list, server-rendered; covers both The Showbox and Showbox SoDo (all labelled 'The Showbox' here). Verified 2026-07.

scrapers.name: Neumos
scrapers.note: AEG events list, server-rendered. Verified 2026-07.

scrapers.name: The Crocodile
scrapers.note: Webflow calendar covering the Crocodile complex (incl. Madame Lou's), server-rendered; the old /events path 404s. Verified 2026-07.

scrapers.name: Jazzbones
scrapers.note: VenuePilot JS widget (renders into #venuepilot-app) — needs the browser to execute JS; selectors are best-effort and may need tuning with HEADLESS=false. The old /events path 404s.

scrapers.name: Tacoma Comedy Club
scrapers.note: Ingested via the 'tacoma-comedy' JSON-LD feed in feeds.json instead — the site embeds full schema.org Event data, no scraping needed.

scrapers.name: The New Frontier Lounge
scrapers.note: DO NOT ENABLE: thenewfrontierlounge.com has expired and now serves an unrelated spam site (checked 2026-07). Re-point the url if the venue returns with a new website.

scrapers.name: Full Tilt Ice Cream (Georgetown)
scrapers.note: DO NOT ENABLE: fulltilticecream.com has expired and now serves an unrelated spam site (checked 2026-07). Re-point the url if the venue returns with a new website.

scrapers.name: Louie G's Pizza
scrapers.note: DO NOT ENABLE: louiegspizza.com now hosts an unrelated law-firm site (checked 2026-07). Re-point the url if the venue has a new website.

scrapers.name: Tacoma Dome
scrapers.note: Sells via Ticketmaster — set TICKETMASTER_API_KEY instead; this scraper is a fallback only.

scrapers.name: Chop Suey
scrapers.note: Sells via Ticketmaster/TicketWeb — prefer the Ticketmaster API; this scraper is a fallback only.

scrapers.name: Paramount Theatre
scrapers.note: STG site returns 403 to automated requests; most STG shows are also on Ticketmaster. Enable only if a real browser can load it.

scrapers.name: Moore Theatre
scrapers.note: STG site returns 403 to automated requests; most STG shows are also on Ticketmaster. Enable only if a real browser can load it.

scrapers.name: Clock-Out Lounge
scrapers.note: TicketWeb widget, server-rendered on the homepage; music + comedy nights. Verified 2026-07 (20 events).

scrapers.name: Airport Tavern
scrapers.note: SeeTickets; the upcoming-shows list (.event-info-block) is server-rendered with full dates — the month calendar only has bare day numbers. Verified 2026-07 (8 events).

scrapers.name: Cryptatropa Bar (The Crypt)
scrapers.note: Wix Events list, server-rendered with stable data-hook attributes. Verified 2026-07 (5 events). No per-item ticket links in the list markup, so ticket_url is usually empty.

scrapers.name: Conor Byrne Pub
scrapers.note: JS-rendered Squarespace calendar (VenuePilot ticketing) — no server-rendered listing to verify against. Tune selectors with HEADLESS=false, then enable.

scrapers.name: Sunset Tavern
scrapers.note: DICE widget — the /shows/ page is a JS shell with no server-rendered events. Tune selectors with HEADLESS=false against the rendered DICE embed, then enable.

scrapers.name: Tracyton Movie House
scrapers.note: VenuePilot JS widget (like Jazzbones) — no server-rendered listing to verify against. Tune selectors with HEADLESS=false, then enable.

scrapers.name: Substation
scrapers.note: Sells via an Eventbrite organizer page (eventbrite.com/o/substation-18831550522), which is a JS app with unstable markup — not scrapeable reliably. Revisit if EventLight grows Eventbrite-organizer ingestion.

scrapers.name: Club Comedy Seattle
scrapers.note: Eventbrite organizer page only — JS app with unstable markup, not scrapeable reliably. Revisit if EventLight grows Eventbrite-organizer ingestion.

scrapers.name: The VERA Project
scrapers.note: No server-rendered listing found on /events/ (site references DICE and an Eventbrite-import plugin). Verify the live calendar path in a browser before enabling.

scrapers.name: Alma Mater (Fawcett Hall)
scrapers.note: Site returns 403 to automated requests on /events, and the homepage event widget showed stale 2021 entries at verification (2026-07). Verify in a real browser before enabling.
